title: Classic Farm Animals
description: Removes the new cow, pig, and chicken variants, along with their eggs, introduced in 1.21.5.
body:
# Archived
I want to focus development on modpacks, and so, i will not be updating this texturepack

---

## Classic Farm Animals

This resource pack replaces the cold and warm variants of cows, pigs, and chickens (and their eggs) with temperate (normal) textures, like pre-1.21.5.

### Details
- Cold and warm variants changed to temperate
- Chicken eggs changed to the temperate variant

### License
none. do whatever you want
